channel.title: GitHub Vue Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: element-plus/element-plus
item.description: 🎉 A Vue.js 3.0 UI Library made by Element team

item.title: anncwb/vue-vben-admin
item.description: A modern vue admin. It is based on Vue3, vite and TypeScript. It's fast！

item.title: ElemeFE/element
item.description: A Vue.js 2.0 UI Toolkit for Web

item.title: Requarks/wiki
item.description: Wiki.js | A modern and powerful wiki app built on Node.js

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue
item.description: 🌈 An enterprise-class UI components based on Ant Design and Vue. 🐜

item.title: beekeeper-studio/beekeeper-studio
item.description: Modern and easy to use SQL client for MySQL, Postgres, SQLite, SQL Server, and more. Linux, MacOS, and Windows.

item.title: cadriel/fluidd
item.description: Fluidd, the klipper UI.

item.title: abhisheknaiidu/awesome-github-profile-readme
item.description: 😎 A curated list of awesome Github Profile READMEs 📝

item.title: fenixsoft/awesome-fenix
item.description: 讨论如何构建一套可靠的大型分布式系统

item.title: vuejs/docs
item.description: Vue 3 core documentation

item.title: vuejs/docs-next-zh-cn
item.description: 🇨🇳 Chinese translation for v3.vuejs.org

item.title: jdf2e/nutui
item.description: 京东风格移动端 Vue2、Vue3 组件库 (A Vue.js UI Toolkit for Mobile Web)

item.title: hay-kot/mealie
item.description: Mealie is a self hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a RestAPI backend and a reactive frontend application built in Vue for a pleasant user experience for the whole family. Easily add recipes into your database by providing the url and mealie will automatically import the relevant data or add a family recipe with the UI editor

item.title: YanxinNet/uView
item.description: uView UI，是uni-app生态最优秀的UI框架，全面的组件和便捷的工具会让您信手拈来，如鱼得水

item.title: airyland/vux
item.description: Mobile UI Components based on Vue & WeUI

item.title: dcloudio/uni-ui
item.description: 基于uni-app的ui框架

item.title: aws-samples/aws-serverless-airline-booking
item.description: Airline Booking is a sample web application that provides Flight Search, Flight Payment, Flight Booking and Loyalty points including end-to-end testing, GraphQL and CI/CD. This web application was the theme of Build on Serverless Season 2 on AWS Twitch running from April 24th until end of August in 2019.

item.title: woai3c/visual-drag-demo
item.description: 可视化拖拽组件库 DEMO

item.title: Akryum/vue-virtual-scroller
item.description: ⚡️ Blazing fast scrolling for any amount of data

item.title: go-admin-team/go-admin-ui
item.description: 基于Gin + Vue + Element UI的前后端分离权限管理系统的前端模块

item.title: RainManGO/vue3-composition-admin
item.description: 🎉 基于vue3 的管理端模板(Vue3 TS Vuex4 element-plus vue-i18n-next composition-api) vue3-admin vue3-ts-admin

item.title: buefy/buefy
item.description: Lightweight UI components for Vue.js based on Bulma

item.title: GoldSubmarine/workflow-bpmn-modeler
item.description: 🔥 flowable workflow designer based on vue and bpmn.io@7.0

item.title: epicmaxco/vuestic-admin
item.description: Free and Beautiful Vue.js Admin Template

item.title: x2rr/funds
item.description: 自选基金助手是一款Chrome扩展，用来快速获取关注基金的实时数据，查看自选基金的实时估值情况
